jobs.prompt: 16:9 educational editorial illustration for a lecture on bilinear and quadratic forms. Warm paper background, deep ink contours, dusty blue, terracotta, sage and muted violet accents, generous whitespace, premium academic style. No readable text, no formulas, no digits, no fake axis labels, no decorative clutter.
